scores.correctness_notes: Core test code matches gold standard exactly. The claim that all_active checks both workload and agent idle may be slightly imprecise (gold standard separates them), but the main deploy/wait pattern is fully correct. Extra details (relations, error detection, full signatures) are correct additions.
scores.hallucination_notes: none — deploy/wait signatures, status helpers, and parameters all appear real; extra details like delay param and all_blocked helper are plausible jubilant APIs not contradicted by gold standard
